info.name: Smart Kitchen API
info.description:
Reduced collection (~90 requests). Run in order: Test Setup first, Cleanup last.

Seeded users:
- adminId=2 (Ellen Levin)
- chefId=1 (Lior Rubinshtein)
- influencerId=6 (Shir Mizrahi)
- userId=4 (Daniel Levi)

Test data is created fresh each run and deleted in Cleanup.

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Protein Omelette",
  "instructions": "Beat eggs, cook in pan, add cheese.",
  "difficulty": "easy",
  "cuisine": "israeli",
  "category": "breakfast",
  "creatorId": 1,
  "prepTime": 10,
  "cookTime": 10,
  "totalTime": 20,
  "servings": 1,
  "calories": 350,
  "tags": ["quick", "high-protein"],
  "allergens": ["eggs", "dairy"],
  "ingredients": [
    { "ingredientId": 2, "quantity": 2, "unit": "piece" },
    { "ingredientId": 6, "quantity": 50, "unit": "gram" }
  ]
}

{
  "title": "My Vegan Salad",

  ]
}
